content_explanation: This is an official letter from the Kingdom of Bahrain's Ministry of the Interior, specifically the Estate Management Office. The letter is addressed to the Director of Financial Affairs. Its primary purpose is to request the initiation of a monthly rent deduction of 60 Bahraini Dinars from the salaries of retired Ministry of the Interior personnel residing in ministry-owned housing units, effective from June 1, 2006. The letter specifically references a tenant named Younis Mohammed Malik, who resides in house number 1273 in Safra. The document is signed by Captain Ibrahim Mohammed Foulad from the Police Housing Management Office.
sender: النقيب/ إبراهيم محمد فولاد، مكتب إدارة إسكان الشرطة
subject: استقطاع الإيجار الشهري للمتقاعدين
